headline: Veralto Announces Acquisition of GlobalVision and the Completion of $300 Million of Share Repurchases
summary: Veralto (NYSE: VLTO) (the "Company"), a global leader in essential water and product quality solutions dedicated to Safeguarding the World's Most Vital Resources™, announced it has entered into a definitive agreement to acquire GlobalVision, subject to customary closing conditions.

raw.headline: Veralto Announces Acquisition of GlobalVision and the Completion of $300 Million of Share Repurchases
raw.summary: Veralto (NYSE: VLTO) (the "Company"), a global leader in essential water and product quality solutions dedicated to Safeguarding the World's Most Vital Resources™, announced it has entered into a definitive agreement to acquire GlobalVision, subject to customary closing conditions.

headline: Veralto Announces Definitive Agreement To Acquire GlobalVision; Purchase Price Is Approximately 15x Estimated Adjusted EBITDA Of $13M
summary: Veralto Announces Definitive Agreement To Acquire GlobalVision; Purchase Price Is Approximately 15x Estimated Adjusted EBITDA Of $13M
